landing.trust.title: AI-powered attention system for businesses that work through calls, messages, and appointments.
landing.trust.subtitle: Aamy brings conversations, rules, bookings, and history together so every request moves with real business context, not as an isolated reply.
landing.capabilities.title: A communication structure designed for real businesses
landing.capabilities.subtitle: Aamy helps keep conversations organized, consistent, and aligned with the way each business operates.
landing.how.title: Guided implementation
landing.how.subtitle: We configure the business information, channels, rules, and processes so client communication has a clear structure from day one.
landing.results.title: A clearer operation
landing.results.subtitle: When every conversation follows a defined process, the team has more context, better organization, and less scattered information.
landing.compare.title: A more structured way to communicate with clients
landing.compare.subtitle: Aamy is designed for businesses that need context, rules, bookings, history, and control in every conversation.
landing.compare.note: * “Partial/Depends” means it may require additional configuration, integrations, or external processes.
landing.testimonials.title: Experiences with Aamy
landing.final.title: Run client attention with AI, rules, and real business context
landing.final.subtitle: Set up your services, hours, policies, booking steps, and channels so Aamy can keep every request organized from first contact to confirmed appointment.
landing.final.tip: Guided setup using the real information from your business.
landing.system.title: More than replies. A structured way to run client attention.
landing.system.subtitle: Aamy uses AI to understand requests, follow your business rules, collect the right details, and keep every conversation connected to the next step.
landing.system.cards.1.title: Client context
landing.system.cards.1.desc: Aamy keeps track of what the customer already said, what is missing, and what should happen next.
landing.system.cards.2.title: Business rules
landing.system.cards.2.desc: Services, hours, policies, service areas, booking steps, and conditions are configured around each business.
landing.system.cards.3.title: Booking-ready requests
landing.system.cards.3.desc: When a request needs an appointment, Aamy collects the required details before moving it forward.
landing.howNew.title: From scattered conversations to a clear attention operation
landing.howNew.subtitle: Aamy is configured around how the business actually works: what it offers, how bookings happen, what information is required, and what rules must be followed before moving forward.
landing.howNew.steps.1.title: The operation is configured
landing.howNew.steps.1.desc: Services, hours, frequently asked questions, rules, policies, service areas, and booking process.
landing.howNew.steps.2.title: The right flow is defined
landing.howNew.steps.2.desc: Each business can have different steps: service, staff member, address, weight, date, name, phone, or confirmation.
landing.howNew.steps.3.title: The customer speaks or writes naturally
landing.howNew.steps.3.desc: The customer can communicate the way they normally would. Aamy understands the request, keeps the context, and follows the defined process.
landing.howNew.steps.4.title: The request stays organized
landing.howNew.steps.4.desc: The business can see what matters: customer, service, date, status, notes, missing details, and next step.
landing.context.title: Aamy works with the information that defines your business
landing.context.subtitle: Every business has its own rules, services, policies, and way of handling clients. Aamy uses that context to avoid generic replies and incomplete processes.
landing.context.cards.1.title: Services
landing.context.cards.1.desc: What the business offers, how it should be explained, and what information each service requires.
landing.context.cards.2.title: Availability
landing.context.cards.2.desc: Hours, appointment duration, buffers, calendar, and rules for offering real options.
landing.context.cards.3.title: Policies
landing.context.cards.3.desc: Cancellations, deposits, service areas, conditions, and important details before confirmation.
landing.context.cards.4.title: Tone
landing.context.cards.4.desc: How the business wants to sound: professional, friendly, direct, or bilingual.
landing.example.title: What process-guided communication looks like
landing.example.subtitle: The client does not need to fill out a cold form. Aamy can have a conversation, collect the required information, and move forward based on the configured rules.
landing.example.structured.title: Structured information
landing.example.chat.1: Hi, I need an appointment for my dog.
landing.example.chat.2: Of course. What service would you like to book?
landing.example.chat.4: Perfect. What is your pet’s approximate weight?
landing.example.chat.6: Thank you. What day and time would you prefer?
landing.example.chat.8: That time is not available. I have nearby options at 9:00 a.m., 11:15 a.m., or 1:00 p.m. Which one works best?
landing.control.title: Designed for real operations, not improvised replies
landing.control.subtitle: Aamy works best when the business needs consistency: the right questions, accurate information, clear processes, and control over how each request is handled.
landing.control.rows.1.title: Per-business configuration
landing.control.rows.1.desc: Each operation keeps its own services, rules, instructions, hours, channels, and integrations.
landing.control.rows.2.title: Defined processes
landing.control.rows.2.desc: Aamy can follow different flows depending on the service, channel, language, or type of request.
landing.control.rows.3.title: Approved information
landing.control.rows.3.desc: Important replies come from the configured context, not from generic improvisation.
landing.control.rows.4.title: Multi-business structure
landing.control.rows.4.desc: The platform is built to handle multiple businesses without mixing data, rules, or behaviors.
hero.subtitle: Aamy brings calls, messages, booking steps, customer details, and business rules into one organized system, so every request moves with context from first contact to confirmed appointment.
hero.bullets.messages.title: Messages
hero.bullets.messages.desc: WhatsApp, Instagram, and Facebook under one structured attention process.
hero.bullets.calls.title: Calls
hero.bullets.calls.desc: Voice conversations aligned with the rules and process defined by your business.
hero.bullets.bookings.title: Bookings
hero.bullets.bookings.desc: Clear flows to collect the required information before confirming an appointment.
hero.bullets.rules.title: Rules
hero.bullets.rules.desc: Services, hours, policies, service areas, and steps configured per business.
hero.micro: Aamy is configured around how your operation works: what you offer, what questions must be asked, what information is missing, and when a request is ready to move forward.
hero.bullets.omni.title: Connected channels
hero.bullets.omni.desc: WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook, and calls under one shared structure.
hero.bullets.pixel.title: Organized data
hero.bullets.pixel.desc: Conversations, events, and customer details organized to review every request more clearly.
hero.bullets.booking.title: Bookings
hero.bullets.booking.desc: Connect calendar to coordinate appointments with clear rules.
hero.bullets.intent.title: Context
hero.bullets.intent.desc: Each conversation moves forward based on what the customer has already shared.
hero.tip.before: AI-powered does not mean losing control:
hero.note: Guided setup using the real information from your business.
benefits.title: What your business gains with
benefits.subtitle: Aamy helps turn calls, messages, bookings, history, and rules into a clearer, measurable, and more consistent attention operation.
benefits.cards.1.title: Context per customer
benefits.cards.1.desc: Aamy keeps track of what the customer already shared and helps continue the interaction without starting from zero.
benefits.cards.2.title: Channels under one structure
benefits.cards.2.desc: WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook, and calls can work with shared rules, history, and customer data.
benefits.cards.3.title: Requests with status
benefits.cards.3.desc: Conversations can stay organized by status, missing information, and next steps.
benefits.cards.4.title: Useful information to review
benefits.cards.4.desc: History and events help you better understand how requests come in, move forward, and get completed.
benefits.cards.5.title: Bookings with calendar
benefits.cards.5.desc: Aamy can help coordinate times, check availability, and keep appointments organized in the calendar.
benefits.cards.6.title: Bilingual attention
benefits.cards.6.desc: The business can handle customers in English or Spanish while keeping the same process and information.
benefits.closing.before: It is not about replying just to reply.
benefits.closing.highlight: It is about running attention with structure.
benefits.closing.after: Aamy helps every request have context, order, and a clear next step.
dashprev.subtitle: Aamy centralizes conversations, channels, customer data, bookings, and operational metrics so the business can review what happened, what is missing, and what needs attention.
dashprev.bullets.1.title: History by channel
dashprev.bullets.1.desc: WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook, and calls in one view, with conversations organized by customer.
dashprev.bullets.2.title: Request status
dashprev.bullets.2.desc: Review whether a request has started, is incomplete, ready to confirm, or needs team attention.
dashprev.bullets.3.title: Attention continuity
dashprev.bullets.3.desc: Keep context for conversations that still have missing information or next steps.
dashprev.bullets.4.title: Operational KPIs
dashprev.bullets.4.desc: Measure conversations, channels, peak activity times, and general service behavior.
dashprev.bullets.5.title: Events and history
dashprev.bullets.5.desc: Record important activity from channels to review each customer journey more clearly.
dashprev.mock.alt: Aamy dashboard preview: conversations, bookings, history, and operational metrics
dashprev.closing: Guided setup with your information. You stay in control; Aamy follows the defined structure.
whofor.title: Who is
whofor.subtitle.before: For businesses that receive conversations every day and need
whofor.subtitle.after: in the way they communicate through messages, calls, and appointments.
whofor.advanced.1.title: Operational context
whofor.advanced.1.desc: Aamy keeps key conversation information to follow the correct process.
whofor.advanced.2.title: Bilingual
whofor.advanced.2.desc: It can work in English or Spanish depending on the business configuration and the client’s language.
whofor.advanced.3.title: Bookings
whofor.advanced.3.desc: Connect calendar to coordinate times and keep appointments organized.
whofor.advanced.4.title: Organized data
whofor.advanced.4.desc: History, channels, and events in a structure the business can review.
whofor.fit.good.title: Ideal if…
whofor.fit.good.1: Your clients ask about services, hours, location, availability, or policies.
whofor.fit.good.2: You need to keep conversations organized across multiple channels.
whofor.fit.good.3: You want every request to follow a clear process.
whofor.fit.good.4: You want to review history, status, and next steps from one panel.
whofor.fit.bad.title: Not the best fit if…
whofor.fit.bad.1: Every case requires extensive technical evaluation before sharing any information.
whofor.fit.bad.2: You do not want to upload minimum business information such as services, hours, policies, or frequently asked questions.
whofor.fit.bad.3: You are looking for a tool with no control or per-business configuration.
whofor.targets.1.title: Local businesses
whofor.targets.1.desc: Beauty salons, clinics, barbershops, tattoo studios, offices, and more.
whofor.targets.2.title: Businesses that communicate through messages
whofor.targets.2.desc: Companies that receive requests through WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook, or calls.
whofor.targets.3.title: Fitness and education
whofor.targets.3.desc: Gyms, indoor cycling, yoga, courses, workshops, and schools.
footer.tagline: Aamy.ai — AI-powered attention system for calls, messages, bookings, and history.
footer.disclaimer: Aamy processes messages using the information configured by each business and the rules of its industry. Results may vary depending on configuration, business type, and message volume.
demoWa.title: What a conversation with Aamy looks like
demoWa.subtitle: Communication with context, business rules, and clear next steps
demoWa.msg.1: Hi, can you give me some information?
demoWa.msg.2: Hi 👋 I’ll be happy to help. What information would you like to know?
demoWa.msg.3: I wanted to know the price
demoWa.msg.4: Of course. The price depends on the service you’re interested in. I can explain the available options.
demoWa.msg.5: Tell me what you’re looking for and I’ll give you the right information.
waDemo.initialText: Hi, I want to see how it works
cap.1.title: Conversations with context
cap.1.desc: Aamy keeps the thread of each conversation and uses the business information to communicate consistently.
cap.2.title: Continuous communication
cap.2.desc: The business can maintain presence in its channels even when the team is not in front of the phone.
cap.3.title: Bilingual
cap.3.desc: Aamy can work in English or Spanish while keeping the same communication process.
cap.4.title: Conversation status
cap.4.desc: Organizes requests by service, missing information, booking, confirmation, or team review.
cap.5.title: Continuity
cap.5.desc: Helps keep open conversations with context and defined next steps.
cap.6.title: Calendar
cap.6.desc: Coordinates availability and helps keep appointments organized in the calendar.
cap.7.title: Events and history
cap.7.desc: Records relevant activity so the business can review each journey more clearly.

trainingHelp.training.note.prefix: This help is based on your current flow:
trainingHelp.training.note.suffix: and Preview. Use shortcuts to jump to each section.
trainingHelp.common.writingTips.1: Be specific about what the assistant must do (sell, book, segment, etc.).
trainingHelp.common.writingTips.2: Paste key info as plain text. Avoid dash bullet lists.
trainingHelp.common.writingTips.3: Don’t say “see more on our website”: the assistant can’t browse external links.
trainingHelp.common.writingTips.4: Include prices, schedules, location, policies, and active promos.
trainingHelp.common.faqTips.1: Write questions the way a customer would (e.g., “How much does it cost?”).
trainingHelp.common.faqTips.2: Answer fully and kindly; avoid “it depends” or “contact us”.
trainingHelp.common.template:
Services and pricing: ...
Location: ...
Hours: ...
Policies: ...
Active promos: ...
Internal/payment links: ...
trainingHelp.cta.explanation.1: Configure CTAs (text + URL) by intent so the assistant suggests the right action when that intent is detected.
trainingHelp.cta.explanation.2: If there’s no CTA for the detected intent, the “global” CTA is used as a fallback.
trainingHelp.cta.explanation.3: The URL must start with http:// or https:// to be valid.
trainingHelp.cta.explanation.4: Recommendation: use short URLs and direct action pages (checkout, booking, confirm, map).
trainingHelp.cta.explanation.5: Tip: “global” works as the default CTA when the customer intent doesn’t match a more specific one.
trainingHelp.cta.template:
Intent: global
CTA text: Start today in 1 minute
CTA URL: https://yoursite.com/start

Intent: price
CTA text: See plans and pricing
CTA URL: https://yoursite.com/pricing

Intent: hours
CTA text: See available hours
CTA URL: https://yoursite.com/hours

Intent: location
CTA text: Get directions (Google Maps)
CTA URL: https://maps.google.com/?q=Your+Business

Intent: book
CTA text: Book my class now
CTA URL: https://yoursite.com/book

Intent: buy
CTA text: Buy my plan
CTA URL: https://yoursite.com/checkout

Intent: confirm
CTA text: Confirm my attendance
CTA URL: https://yoursite.com/confirm

Intent: class_interest
CTA text: See beginner classes
CTA URL: https://yoursite.com/get-started
trainingHelp.cta.examplesFitness:
Scenario: Customer asks "How much does it cost?"
→ Detected intent: price
→ Suggested CTA: "See plans and pricing" → https://synergyzone.fit/pricing

Scenario: "Where are you located?"
→ Intent: location
→ CTA: "Get directions (Google Maps)" → https://maps.google.com/?q=Synergy+Zone

Scenario: "I want to book for tomorrow"
→ Intent: book
→ CTA: "Book my class now" → https://synergyzone.fit/book
trainingHelp.cta.examplesBeauty:
Scenario: "How much are eyebrows?"
→ Intent: price
→ CTA: "See eyebrow & lash pricing" → https://andreacastrobeauty.com/pricing

Scenario: "Do you have availability today?"
→ Intent: hours
→ CTA: "See available hours" → https://andreacastrobeauty.com/book

Scenario: "Where are you?"
→ Intent: location
→ CTA: "Get directions (Google Maps)" → https://maps.google.com/?q=Andrea+Castro+Beauty
trainingHelp.sections.training.ctaByInte: Go to the “CTA by intent” section.
trainingHelp.sections.training.commonMis: Bullet-format info that gets skipped by the generator.
trainingHelp.sections.meta.quickSteps.2: Fill business info and welcome message.
trainingHelp.sections.meta.quickSteps.3: Add FAQs and Intents for the “meta” channel.
trainingHelp.sections.meta.faqsAndIntent: Use real examples from your DMs.
trainingHelp.sections.voice.quickSteps.2: Define what it must achieve (book, qualify, charge, etc.).
trainingHelp.sections.voice.quickSteps.4: Add Hints (common phrases separated by commas).
trainingHelp.sections.voice.bestPractice: In Hints, use short, common phrases (e.g., “I want to book, class price, address”).
trainingHelp.sections.campaignSms.quickS: Write the SMS content (you can include a link).
Schedule the send date and time.
trainingHelp.sections.campaignSms.tips.1: Be short and clear; include a call to action.
trainingHelp.sections.campaignEmail.quic: Write Subject and Message; add an image if you want.
